text.title: speech-to-text-basics Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for speech-to-text-basics as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using response_format other than "verbose_json" when requesting timestamp_granularities=["word"]
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Non-verbose formats silently drop word timestamps — no error is raised, the timestamps are simply absent from the response.

failure-mode.description: Polling AssemblyAI or AWS Transcribe with a synchronous await
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Long audio transcription jobs via cloud services are async — agent must poll a status URL. Synchronous waiting blocks the event loop for minutes.
